rag_rules: Place assume/guarantee declarations in component type annexes; use assign only in implementation annexes for output features or auxiliary variables
Use only identifiers visible in the current component scope; do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be scoped to their owning component and use visible symbols from the AADL model
Component type contracts should express input assumptions and output guarantees using concrete bounds or visible relations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` and support assume, guarantee, eq, const, and assign statements
Assign statements are valid only in implementation scope for output features or declared auxiliary variables
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names like Compute_Execution_Time or unit tokens (ms, Hz) as AGREE variables
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope or use implementation-only subcomponent paths in type annexes
